programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George builds a bed underneath his desk, Elaine gets a mattress from her back-conscious new boyfriend; Jerry struggles with an indecisive carpenter, while Kramer takes extreme measures to swim.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry doubts his dentist's religious conversion; Kramer and Mickey fight over a double date as Elaine undermines a couple's chances at adoption.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry lobbies for a good spot on his girlfriend's speed dial, George tries getting himself fired so he can accept a better job.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine and a former boss join forces in a muffin top business; George pretends to be a tourist in order to get a date.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After Jerry invites an attractive waitress to join him at the Tony Awards, he learns Kramer will be there, too. Arriving for their date, Jerry is surprised to find Lanette living with another man.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George gets a new job after he's mistaken for being handicapped while Jerry suspects Bania is taking advantage of him; Kramer's latest shaving technique backfires as Elaine breaks up with her boyfriend during a trans-Atlantic flight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry risks losing a girlfriend over a joke, George continues to work despite having been asked to leave; Elaine finds breaking up is hard to do as Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine; Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment; Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As a bad check threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation, raising chickens involves Kramer in illegal cockfighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks; Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry buys back a car his parents sold as the Costanzas decide to spend George's inheritance; Kramer can't sleep with his new girlfriend, while Peterman returns unexpectedly.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry new girlfriend seems to goo to be true; George awards a scholarship to an average student; Elaine turns to Kramer for help in preparing Peterman's autobiography.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While Elaine suffers in a case of mistaken identity and an ex-friend fears Jerry's retribution, George avoids a girlfriend looking to break up.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George loses a prized keychain in a pothole, Kramer adopts a section of highway.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's opinion of a film lands her in hot water; Kramer gets stuck with a trio of Cubans cigar rollers while George is obsessed with a beautiful woman's boyfriend.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George builds a bed underneath his desk, Elaine gets a mattress from her back-conscious new boyfriend; Jerry struggles with an indecisive carpenter, while Kramer takes extreme measures to swim.

programme.desc: Jerry doubts his dentist's religious conversion; Kramer and Mickey fight over a double date as Elaine undermines a couple's chances at adoption.

programme.desc: Elaine and a former boss join forces in a muffin top business; George pretends to be a tourist in order to get a date.

programme.desc: After Jerry invites an attractive waitress to join him at the Tony Awards, he learns Kramer will be there, too. Arriving for their date, Jerry is surprised to find Lanette living with another man.

programme.desc: George gets a new job after he's mistaken for being handicapped while Jerry suspects Bania is taking advantage of him; Kramer's latest shaving technique backfires as Elaine breaks up with her boyfriend during a trans-Atlantic flight.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry risks losing a girlfriend over a joke, George continues to work despite having been asked to leave; Elaine finds breaking up is hard to do as Kramer hires an assistant.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine; Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George squares off against a shipwreck survivor over a new apartment; Jerry attempts to help Newman get a much sought-after transfer to Hawaii.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As a bad check threatens to ruin Jerry's reputation, raising chickens involves Kramer in illegal cockfighting; George dates a women's prison inmate.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry discovers he's been duped by a hapless tennis pro, George seeks revenge against a co-worker's cutting remarks; Kramer enlists Elaine's help in drafting a living will.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry accepts his girlfriend's challenge to get angry, George tries selling computers with is father as Elaine fends off Lippman and his teenage son.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer starts his own blood bank and George works at combining, sex, food and television.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Kramer's efforts to stop junk mail jeopardizes Newman; Jerry tries to avoid hurting an old friend's feelings, while George suspects his parents are avoiding him and Elaine falls for a TV commercial personality.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Kramer puts a discarded talk show set in his apartment, Jerry schemes to play with a girlfriend's vintage toys; while Elaine deals with a scheming employee.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While Jerry dates a dermatologist to help George deceive a new employer, Kramer is obsessed with a new meat slicer.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine takes Jerry and George to India to upset a rival's wedding; Kramer is the object of an evil birthday wish.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While George demands an apology, Jerry is troubled by a girlfriend's frequent nudity.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine accidentally gives out a fake phone number on the back of a free sandwich coupon; George's father revives a holiday he invented to replace Christmas.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine's boyfriend promises Jerry a good deal on a new car.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine accidentally tosses out a friend's fur coat; Jerry and George disagree over the need for a wallet.
